♟️

How to play

Drag the pieces onto the board (or tap to select, then tap a cell). While carrying a piece, the tinted cells behind it show what it controls. No piece may land on a cell controlled by another.

  • ♛Queen: rows, columns and diagonals.
  • ♜Rook: rows and columns.
  • ♝Bishop: diagonals only.
  • ♞Knight: the L-shaped squares around it.
  • ♚King: the 8 neighbouring squares.
  • ♟Pawn: one step diagonally forward.

A wrong placement costs a heart and the piece bounces back. Run out of hearts and the level restarts. Tap a placed piece to pick it up.

Later levels add blocks 📦: no piece can sit on them, and they cut the line of rooks, bishops and queens, so they can't threaten past a block. Knights and kings ignore blocks.

Pick the Mark ✕ tool and slide across the board to flag squares you think are unusable (just notes). Start a slide on an existing mark to erase. Or toggle Auto-mark ⚡ to automatically cross out every square attacked by your placed pieces.
